name: Queen Ranch Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick pan, sauté chicken and onion in margarine until cooked through.
2. Add cornstarch and 1 cup of chicken broth. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add the remaining 1/2 cup of chicken broth, tomatoes, and green chilies. Cook until thickened.
4. In a casserole dish, layer tortillas, cheese, and chicken mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 40 minutes.
